heading: Omitted
label: 326 to 330 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 326 to 330, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 326, acts , title II, ; , , authorized incurring of obligations for roads, bridges, and trails in advance of appropriations in certain cases.Feb. 12, 1925, ch. 22543 Stat. 930June 30, 1932, ch. 320, § 147 Stat. 446Section 327, acts , ; , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to accept contributions from Territory or from other sources for use in construction, maintenance, or repair of roads, bridges, ferries, trails, and related works in the Territory.June 30, 1921, ch. 33, § 142 Stat. 90June 30, 1932, ch. 320, § 147 Stat. 446Section 328, , , related to estimates for work on roads.act July 9, 1918, ch. 14340 Stat. 863Section 329, acts , ; , , related to expenses of board in addition to salary.Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 233 Stat. 616May 14, 1906, ch. 2458, § 234 Stat. 192Section 330, , , related to per diem commutation of Army officer member of board.act Apr. 27, 1914, ch. 7238 Stat. 366
